seoTitle: How to Create a Free Brevo Account, Step by Step
metaDescription: Sign up for Brevo's free marketing plan without a payment card, from choosing the zero-cost tier to verifying your email and unlocking send credits.
intro: Getting started with email marketing shouldn't require entering a credit card just to explore the platform. Brevo's free tier lets you register and start sending without upfront payment. This guide walks through the signup flow, from picking the free plan to confirming your account so you can unlock your daily sending credits.

steps.heading: Go to Brevo's signup page
steps.body: Navigate to Brevo's registration page and choose to sign up using a standard email or an available single sign-on option.

steps.heading: Select the zero-cost plan
steps.body: During onboarding, choose the free baseline subscription tier rather than a paid plan, since the free plan doesn't require entering payment details.

steps.heading: Fill out your company profile
steps.body: Enter basic company information and initial sender attributes as prompted, which Brevo uses to set up your account correctly.

steps.heading: Verify your email address
steps.body: Complete the standard email confirmation step to validate your account and pass Brevo's verification process.

steps.heading: Unlock your sending credits
steps.body: Once verified, your account activates with the daily marketing broadcast credits included in the free plan, letting you start sending campaigns right away.

faq.question: Do I need a credit card to sign up for Brevo's free plan?
faq.answer: No, the free tier is designed to be activated without entering payment card details.

faq.question: How many emails can I send on the free plan?
faq.answer: The free plan includes a set daily sending credit allowance rather than unlimited sending, which is enough to start testing campaigns.

faq.question: Can I sign up using single sign-on?
faq.answer: Yes, Brevo supports signing up using standard workspace email credentials or available single sign-on options.

faq.question: What happens if I don't verify my email?
faq.answer: You won't be able to fully activate your account or unlock sending credits until you complete the standard email verification step.
